rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Permitted Audience Value
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Value element carrying a controlled string naming an audience permitted to access the linked data element. Example DataElement_Value values: 'Public', 'EconomicOperator', 'MarketSurveillanceAuthority', 'ServiceProvider'.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Put Into Service Date
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Single value data element capturing the date/time when the battery item was put into service. The actual timestamp is given via DataElement_Value with xsd:dateTimeStamp. Access control is attached via hasAccessPermission.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Battery Item
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Represents a single physical battery item to which a DPP refers. Used in CQs that link a battery item to its battery passport (DPP) via an identifier.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasBatteryIdentifier
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a Battery Item to its Battery Identifier data element, whose DataElement_Value is the unique identifier enabling linkage to the DPP.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasProvisionLocationValue
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Specialized value-link for Identifier Provision Location listing locations (as ProvisionLocationValue). Presence of a value with DataElement_Value 'BatteryLabel' answers whether the identifier is provided on the battery label; other values provide alternative locations.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Lower Operational Voltage Limit Reference
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Single value data element containing the lower operational voltage limit used as reference for determining deep discharge events of the battery item. The referenced limit value is given via DataElement_Value (e.g., numeric value) and, if needed, its unit may be provided by an adjacent unit data element.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasPermittedAudience
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Specialized value-link for Access Permission listing audiences (as PermittedAudienceValue) permitted to access the associated data element. Presence of a value with DataElement_Value 'Public' answers whether the identifier (or another element) is publicly accessible.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Access Permission
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Multi-value data element that specifies which audiences are permitted to access a given data element (e.g., Battery Identifier, Put Into Service Date). Each permitted audience is represented by a PermittedAudienceValue value element.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasAccessPermission
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Attaches an Access Permission (multi-value data element) to any data element (e.g., Battery Identifier, Put Into Service Date) to specify who is permitted to access it.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Extreme Temperature Exposure Unit
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Single value data element indicating the unit used to express the time spent by the battery item in extreme temperatures above a boundary (e.g., 'hour', 'minute'). The unit string is given via DataElement_Value.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Battery Identifier
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Single value data element containing the unique identifier of a battery item that enables a link to the DPP (battery passport). The identifier string is given via DataElement_Value.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: linksToDPP
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Connects a Battery Identifier data element to the DPP (battery passport) it enables access to. Used to answer which battery passport is linked to a battery item via the identifier.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Identifier Provision Location
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Multi-value data element listing where the battery identifier is provided (e.g., BatteryLabel, Packaging, AccompanyingDocument, Online). Values are ProvisionLocationValue instances; presence of value 'BatteryLabel' answers whether the identifier is on the battery label; other values cover alternatives when labeling directly on the item is not feasible.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Provision Location Value
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Value element carrying a controlled string for a provisioning location of the battery identifier. Example DataElement_Value values: 'BatteryLabel', 'Packaging', 'AccompanyingDocument', 'Online'.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: Post-Accident Required Safety Assessment
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Single value data element specifying the battery safety assessment that must follow identification of an accident event for the battery item. The assessment name/procedure is given via DataElement_Value.

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: hasProvisionLocation
rdf:Description.rdfs:comment: Links a Battery Identifier data element to its Identifier Provision Location multi-value data element that lists where the identifier is provided.
